sections.heading: Zero Conditional
sections.content:
**If + present simple, present simple**
Dùng cho sự thật hiển nhiên, quy luật tự nhiên

examples.vi: Nếu bạn đun nước, nó sôi.

examples.en: If it rains, the grass **gets** wet.

sections.heading: First Conditional
sections.content:
**If + present simple, will + V**
Dùng cho tình huống có thể xảy ra trong tương lai

examples.vi: Nếu trời mưa, tôi sẽ ở nhà.
Nếu bạn học chăm, bạn sẽ đậu.

exercises.question: If it rains tomorrow, I ___ an umbrella.
If you ___ (not/hurry), you will be late.

exercises.sentence: If it will rain, I stay home.
exercises.correctSentence: If it rains, I will stay home.

exercises.answer: If you study you will pass.

exercises.question: If she ___ early, she catches the bus.
If I ___ (have) time, I will visit you.

exercises.sentence: If you will eat too much, you get sick.
exercises.correctSentence: If you eat too much, you get sick.

exercises.answer: If we win we will celebrate.
